msContents.summary: Although the first folio has been lost, and the name of the text is not given anywhere, the text matches that of the extant published portions of the Kavikāmadhenu.

supportDesc.foliation: Devanāgarī numerals, left & right margins, verso.

acquisition.p: The title card indicates that it was part of the Centra Library in Baroda, in the Sanskrit section.

body.p:
dhur ity ukte hi kṛta iti pratīyate | tadapekṣaḥ padayoḥ sambandhaḥ ṣaṣṭhīsamāso vā | jñānadayayoḥ siṃdhur iva siṃdhur vipulādhā
raḥ agādhasyānyair anadhigatajñānadayāpāratvād aparicchedyagāṃbhīryasya | tasya hi bhagavataḥ sakalajñeyamaṃḍalavyāpino jñānasya karuṇā
yāś ca duḥkhārṇavanimagnam anantam atrāṇaṃ jagad abhivyāpyocchalitāyāḥ kaḥ paryantaṃ gantum īśaḥ | evaṃbhūtasya yasya anaghā rāgādidoṣai rahi
tāḥ | guṇā maitrīkṣamopagamādayaḥ | guṇa āmaṃtraṇa ity adanto dhātuś curādiśeṣaḥ | sa hi gaṇo 'parisamāpto vṛdaka
raṇāt | guṇyante 'bhyasyante śreyārvvirthibhir ity evar ac | he dhīrāḥ sevyatāṃ bhavadbhir iti gamyate |

lg.l:
hitaś ca yaḥ syān na
hitāhite paṭuḥ
paṭuś ca yaḥ syān na hito na sa kṣamaḥ

body.p:
paramakaruṇādiguṇacālitvād eva parahitasukhasaṃpādaneṣu nāsti kṣayo virāmo 'syety akṣayaḥ
saṃsārād vā suṣṭhugatatvenājarāmaratvād akṣayo 'napāyaḥ |

samudrasyāgādhatvam atalasparśatā | anaghaguṇatvaṃ ratnākaratvādi
hi | akṣayatvaṃ paripūrṇatā | phalapravaṇā ca sakalajanapravṛttiphalam upadarśayati | śriye cāmṛtāya ceti pākāya
vrajativat tādarthye caturthī | cakārāv anyonyasamuccaye | prasiddhaḥ kila siṃdhur dhairyaśālibhiḥ suraiḥ śriyai lakṣmyai amṛ
tāya | pīyūṣāya ca sevitaḥ | jñānadayāsiṃdhodhuś ca bhavasukheṣubhir vicakṣaṇaiḥ śriye trivarggasampatyai mumukṣubhiś cāmṛtāya
mokṣāya sevyatām iti |

avatra ca jñānadayārṇatvādibhiḥ sa eva sarvvajñaḥ sarvvasatveṣu karuṇāparamāmavatsalasvarbhāvo bhagavā
n sugato vyaktam upalakṣyata iti | prasādo nāmāyaṃ kāvyaguṇaḥ | tad uktaṃ sarasvatīkaṇṭhābharaṇakāvyālaṃkāre | yat tu prākaṭyam artha
sya prasādaḥ so bhidhīyate || yathā

lg.l:
ayam udayati mudrābhaṃjanaḥ padminīnām udayati girivanālībālamaṃ
dārapuṣpaḥ

body.p:
atra tamo
vidhamane kokaśokaharaṇādau cānukto pi sūryalakṣaṇo rthaḥ prakaṭam upalakṣata iti ||

śveśleṣena śāstre pi ślo
ko yaṃ || tatra vikavitvavaktṛtvādau samastavidyāsthāneṣu ca | jñānasya dānan dāḥ tasyā i lakṣmīs tayā jñāna
dānasampadāhetubhūtayā siṃdhur iva siṃdhuḥ śāstraṃ | heturūpakam alaṃkāro yaṃ | yathā gāṃbhīryeṇa samudro sīti | tasyāgādhatvaṃ
yathoktaguṇavattadāyā | atalasparśatvaṃ | duḥkhainovyasaneṣv agham iti | abhidhānād anaghaguṇatvaṃ | sukhahetulaghutvavispa
ṣṭatvādi sevā śrutacintāvyākhyānādiḥ | akṣayatvātvaṃ saṃpūrṇatā sarvvanāmaśabdaiḥ prakrāntasya liṃgam ādīyate prakāśyamānasya vā |
tad yathā | karmmaṇā yad abhipreti saṃpradānaṃ | aṇau yat karmma ṇau cektaṃt sa kartā | tad atra kāmacārāc chrutatvāc ca prakāntasyaiva siṃdhuśabdasya liṃ
gena sa iti nirddeśo na nāmaliṃgānunāsanaśabdasya | śrīs trivarggasya saṃpattiḥ | tad uktaṃ vyāḍinā

athavā | yāvan mayasarvvajñatvalakṣaṇā svārtha
saṃpat | yā ca taddhetukā trivarggahetuḥ parārthasampat | tadubhayī śrīḥ | svaparārthasampadā ca puṇyajñānasaṃbhārād a
yatvāyāto mokṣo mṛtam iti ||
